title: Use relative GitHub submodule URLs to propagate CI auth tokens

source.subject: git: use relative GitHub submodule URLs for token propagation

body:
Uses **relative GitHub submodule URLs** so CI token auth propagates to nested submodule fetches.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c2526bb`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c2526bb)
- **Subject:** git: use relative GitHub submodule URLs for token propagation
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Git configuration fix supporting Open VSX and aggregate CI.
